rulings.Case Title: SUSAN JEFFRIES-FITZGERALD VS. REN VOLPE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT On Behalf Of Defendant Amanda Stabb Pursuant To C.C.P. Sec. 437c
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 29, 2018, Line 1. DEFENDANT AMANDA STABB's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Pursuant To C.C.P. Sec. 437c DENIED because the evidence presents a triable issue of material fact. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GARY MITCHELL VS. STEVEN BRATTESANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Steven Brattesani'S Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 29, 2018, Line 2. Defendant Steven Brattesani'S Motion For Summary Adjudication DENIED because Defendant has failed to carry the initial burden of production to make a prima facie showing that there are no triable issues of material fact. (Aguilar v. Atlantic Richfield Co. (2001) 25 Cal.4th 826, 850.) =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DELWIN M. BLACKMAN III VS. TAMARA CARLIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel: (1) Responses To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Discovery Requests; (2) Attendance At Deposition; And (3) Site Inspection
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 29, 2018, Line 7. PLAINTIFF DELWIN BLACKMAN's Motion To Compel: (1) Responses To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Discovery Requests; (2) Attendance At Deposition; And (3) Site Inspection GRANTED. Court intends to impose separate sanctions for every misuse of the discovery process. (Code Civ. Proc. § 2023.030.) Hearing required. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: XIAOFEI LI VS. VERONICA PINEDA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 29, 2018, Line 3. DEFENDANTs VERONICA PINEDA and PAUL SALAS' Motion For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs GRANTED. Defendants are entitled to $2,750 and $510 in costs. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SHIRLEY YANHUA YU VS. FRANCISCO PLEITEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 29, 2018, Line 4. DEFENDANTs FRANCISCO PLEITEZ and MARIA PLEITEZ's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED subject to opposition. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LAI PING CHAN VS. FENNY WIJAYANTI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 29, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANTs FENNY WIJAYANTI, JOHN STEWARTZ and PATRICK DUFFY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED because the notice and complaint properly state a ground for recovery as enumerated in San Francisco Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Ordinance. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NGUEY LAY VS. GREENMD LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 29, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT GREENMD, LLC's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED. =(501/CFH)
